chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 267 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For orders on CMA No.1318/2024 (U/A) 28.03.2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency is granted. Learned Counsel does not press this petition and submits that he would approach before the proper forum. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail remedy before the proper forum, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
